ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "conference_description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the college or university */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the school belongs to */,
  "school_url" TEXT /* URL to the school's logo or official site */,
  "school_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the school (BLOB or Base64 encoded) */,
  "school_description" TEXT /* Description of the school */,
  "school_location" TEXT /* Location of the school (city, state) */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (public or private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the team belongs to */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g. football, basketball) */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school associated with the metrics */,
  "projected_points" INTEGER /* Projected points based on team performance */,
  "number_of_prospects" INTEGER /* Number of prospects currently being evaluated */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment_data" (
  "recruitment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school associated with the recruitment data */,
  "recruitment_year" INTEGER /* Year of recruitment */,
  "total_recruits" INTEGER /* Total number of recruits for the year */,
  "recruitment_date" TEXT /* Date when the recruitment data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_data_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prospects" (
  "prospect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prospect */,
  "prospect_name" TEXT /* Name of the prospect */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the prospect belongs to */,
  "prospect_position" TEXT /* Position of the prospect */,
  "prospect_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the prospect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prospect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prospects_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the platform was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school associated with the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
